title: croton lissophyllus
intro: Croton lissophyllus, also known as the croton or Malaysian croton, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Croton lissophyllus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections, among others. The plant's herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used topically or orally to harness its medicinal properties.
